title: Marketing Manager*in (w/m/d)
required_skills: Marketing execution (website, presentations, social media, webinars)
Degree in Marketing, Communication, Business or equivalent
Strategic thinking combined with operational execution
Structured work approach and strong communication skills
bonus_skills: Interest in design, architecture, exhibitions or spatial projects
matched_skills: GTM strategy (maps to Marketing/Communication strategy development)
Market segmentation, Competitive analysis, Voice-of-customer research (maps to Market and target group analysis)
Trade fair & meeting presentation (maps to Event and conference representation)
Product launch execution + GTM strategy (maps to Strategic thinking + operational execution)
Sales enablement & collateral development (maps to Marketing execution / presentations)
MBA from Leuphana University (partial match for business/marketing degree)
English fluent (maps to good English requirement)
missing_skills: German C1+ (very good German skills) — CV shows B2 only; this is a stated REQUIRED skill and a critical gap
Direct brand/marketing communication role title (background is Product Marketing, not pure Marketing Manager)
Demonstrated website, social media channel management experience not evidenced in CV
Specific interest or project experience in design, architecture or exhibition sector (only peripheral via Leyard display tech)
core_responsibilities: Develop and advance marketing and market strategy in national and international contexts
Sharpen brand positioning and develop suitable communication formats
Plan and execute marketing measures: website, presentations, social media, webinars
Analyse markets, target groups and networks; support acquisition and proposals
Represent werk5 at events, conferences and professional gatherings
culture_keywords: Schnittstelle von Architektur und Kommunikation (intersection of architecture and communication)
recommended_emphasis: Highlight GTM strategy and product positioning work at Futu Holdings and Leyard Europe as direct evidence of marketing strategy capability
Emphasise multi-market EMEA/Asia promotion experience to address the international marketing requirement
Feature trade fair presentation and competitive analysis skills to demonstrate market representation and analysis
Showcase any website, social media or webinar-related deliverables from past roles if available
Acknowledge German language level honestly; frame B2 as actively progressing toward C1 if that is the case
Connect Leyard Europe (display/visual technology) to spatial/exhibition adjacent context to partially address the design/architecture interest signal
